indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip surface suitable for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: seating areas
indicators.rationale: Seating areas obstruct the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: dining tables
indicators.rationale: Dining tables block the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: chairs
indicators.rationale: Chairs block the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: couches
indicators.rationale: Couches block the open floor space required for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The hardwood flooring is suitable for yoga practice, but the presence of seating areas, dining tables, chairs, and couches obstructs the open floor space required for yoga. Therefore, the space is only marginally adequate for yoga, receiving a score of 2.
